title: Koanophyllon pittieri
taxonomy: Koanophyllon pittieri belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a type of flowering plant, specifically a species of the genus Koanophyllon. Within the plant kingdom, Koanophyllon pittieri is classified as an angiosperm, which is a group of plants that produce flowers and seeds within fruits. Further classification places it in the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. This classification system organizes the plant into its respective taxonomic groups based on shared characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
